docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
Here's a list of all the chat commands you can use on my Twitch stream. Click on any !commands to copy them to your clipboard.

I use Streamer.bot, StreamElements, Ko-fi Stream Alerts, and a chatbot account to manage my chat commands.

StreamElements commands can also be found on my StreamElements profile page.

docs.title: Interaction
docs.text: Name Command(s) Description Bot Reply Bot Bonk !bonk username Lets you give a virtual bonk to another user. {targetUser} is given a Bonk on the head by {user} Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Hug !hug username Lets you give a virtual hug to another user. {user} gives {targetUser} a great big hugg Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Lurk !lurk Shares that you're lurking in the stream. Thanks for being here! Enjoy your Lurk {user} <3 Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Poke !poke username Lets you give a virtual poke to another user. {targetUser} has been poked by {user} Such violence... Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Say Hi !hi, !arrive, !checkin, !cookie Shares that you're saying hi and provides you with a complimentary cookie (1/stream). Thanks for saying hiii {user} Here's your complementary cookie GivePLZ 🍪 Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Tuck !tuck username, !tuckin username Lets you virtually tuck-in another user. {user} tucks {targetUser} into bed tuckk Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Unlurk !unlurk Shares that you are in the stream, but no longer lurking. Welcome back {user} <3 Streamer.bot (@auragolem)

docs.title: Just for Fun
docs.text: Name Command(s) Description Bot Reply Bot Flip Coin !flipcoin Flips a coin and tells you the result. {user} flipped a coin...and it landed on...{result} Streamer.bot (@auragolem)

docs.title: Socials
docs.text: Name Command(s) Description Bot Reply Bot Link All Socials !socials, !links, !linktree Posts a link to the streamer's Linktr.ee page. Here are my linkies! :D https://linktr.ee/groundaura Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Link Bluesky !bluesky, !bsky Posts a link to the streamer's Bluesky account. Follow me on Bluesky! https://bsky.app/profile/groundaura.bsky.social Streamer.bot (@auragolem) (disabled) Link Discord !discord, !server Posts a link to the streamer's Discord server. Join the Discord! (we have cookies) {link} Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Link GitHub !github, !gh Posts a link to the streamer's GitHub account. Check out my work on GitHub! https://github.com/GroundAura Streamer.bot (@auragolem) KofiStreamBot Link !kofi, !ko-fi Posts a link to the streamer's Ko-fi page. Ko-fi link is: https://ko-fi.com/groundaura?ref=Twitch Ko-fi Stream Alerts (@KofiStreamBot) Link Ko-fi !donate, !tip Posts a link to the streamer's Ko-fi page. Support me on Ko-fi! https://ko-fi.com/groundaura Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Link Nexus !nexus, !nexusmods Posts a link to the streamer's Nexus Mods account. Check out my work on Nexus! https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/GroundAura Streamer.bot (@auragolem) (disabled) Link Patreon !patreon Posts a link to the streamer's Patreon page. Support me on Patreon! https://www.patreon.com/c/groundaura Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Link Twitch !twitch, !ttv Posts a link to the streamer's Twitch account. Follow me on Twitch! https://www.twitch.tv/groundaura (you're already here silly) Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Link Twitter !twitter, !x Posts a link to the streamer's Twitter/X account. Follow me on Twitter! https://x.com/GroundAura Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Link YouTube !youtube, !yt Posts a link to the streamer's YouTube account. Subscribe on YouTube! https://www.youtube.com/@groundaura Streamer.bot (@auragolem)

docs.title: Stream Info
docs.text: Name Command(s) Description Bot Reply Bot (disabled) About Me !aboutme, !about, !aura, !streamer Shares some info about the streamer. Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Commands !commands, !cmds Posts a link to a list of all stream commands. All commands: https://groundaura.github.io/streaming/commands Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Commands (Stream Elements) !secmds, !secommands, !streamelementscmds Posts a link to StreamElements commands. You can find a list of all Commands here https://StreamElements.com/groundaura/commands Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Extensions !extensions Shares some info about browser extensions to use with Twitch. If you're on PC, you can use some of Aura's recommended browser extensions to improve your viewing experience.You can view additional emotes using 7TV (https://7tv.app).You can view others' pronouns and set your own using Twitch Chat Pronouns (https://pr.alejo.io).You can customize and enhance your Twitch experience further using 7TV, FrankerFaceZ (https://www.frankerfacez.com), and Previews (https://previews-app.com) extensions. Streamer.bot (@auragolem) (disabled) Modlist !modlist, !mods Posts a link to what mods the streamer is using in the current game. Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Streamer Pronouns !pronouns Tells you the streamer's pronouns. Aura uses he/him pronouns. Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Time !time, !auratime Tells you what time it is for the streamer. The time for GroundAura is {time} Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Up Time !uptime Tells you how long stream has being live for. groundaura has been streaming for {time} StreamElements (@StreamElements)

docs.title: Viewer Info
docs.text: Name Command(s) Description Bot Reply Bot Account Age !accountage, !accage, !created Tells you how long ago your account (or a target user's) was created. {user|targetUser} was born {time} ago Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Cookie Count !cookies, !cookiejar Tells you how many times you (or a target user) have said !hi and received their complementary cookie. {user|targetUser} has {count} Cookies in their jar! Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Follow Age !followage, !howlong Tells you how long you (or a target user) have been following. {user|targetUser} has been following for {time} Streamer.bot (@auragolem) Watch Time !watchtime, !viewtime Tells you how much time you (or a target user) has spent watching stream. {user|targetUser} has spent {time} watching groundaura StreamElements (@StreamElements)

docs.title: Moderator Commands
docs.text: Name Command(s) Description Bot Reply Bot Test Streamer.bot !streamerbot Tests whether Streamer.bot is connected and working. Streamer.bot is connected! Streamer.bot (@auragolem)
